name: The weirdest healing power
description:
In a world with innate superhuman powers, you evoked a strong healing factor but at the cost of... sex ?

Jinn (left, water mage) Rika (Middle : super strengh warrior) and Orlan ( Right: Super vision ranger)

The ammount of "" sex "" needed to heal is proportionate to the injury, ranging from a kiss in the neck to hardcore anal sex.
creator: Redsuns
